mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM teacher_info WHERE status = 1 AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student_info WHERE status = 1 AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mental_questionnaire WHERE status = 1 AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT student_id) FROM mental_assessment WHERE level IN ('高危', '重度')
SELECT DATE(create_time) as day, COUNT(*) as count FROM teacher_info WHERE deleted = 0 AND DATE(create_time) >= #{startDate} GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ORDER BY day
SELECT DATE(create_time) as day, COUNT(*) as count FROM student_info WHERE deleted = 0 AND DATE(create_time) >= #{startDate} GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ORDER BY day
SELECT CASE user_type WHEN 0 THEN '行政人员' WHEN 1 THEN '教师' WHEN 2 THEN '学生' ELSE '其他' END as name, COUNT(*) as value FROM sys_user WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1 GROUP BY user_type
SELECT username, role, ip, DATE_FORMAT(login_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as time FROM sys_login_log WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY login_time DESC LIMIT 10
